title: PlanStepDelegatedPayload (v1)
description: Payload of a `plan_step_delegated` event — step handed off to a remote agent. See spec/plan-lifecycle-v1.md §5.5.

ordinal.description: Zero-based position of the step within its plan.

task_id.description: Relay-issued task identifier. Matches the subsequent AgentTaskCompleted.task_id.

routing_choice.description: Routing provenance picked by the semiring. Opaque to this spec; forward-compat via passthrough.

goal_id.description: Owning goal when the plan serves a goal.
